features.title: Task card research entry
features.description: Allow users to select a ticker and one of the MVP research task cards without free-form prompt input.

features.title: Latest Earnings Readout
features.description: Replace the default Analyze flow with a structured earnings dashboard backed by source context.

features.title: Business Driver Deep Dive
features.description: Analyze products, segments, demand, pricing, customers, competition, and strategy using evidence-backed RAG.

features.title: Cash Flow and Capital Allocation
features.description: Analyze operating cash flow, free cash flow, capex, buybacks, dividends, debt, and liquidity.

features.title: Bounded Agent workflow
features.description: Run a controlled LangGraph workflow with structured events, fallback states, and no exposed chain-of-thought.

features.title: LlamaIndex RAG pipeline
features.description: Build SEC filing ingestion, section-aware parsing, nodes, metadata, retrieval, rerank, and source packaging.

features.title: Evidence-aware generation
features.description: Attach key claims to source snippets, section metadata, filing metadata, and citation status.

features.title: RAG baseline evaluation
features.description: Create Stage 0 eval datasets and compare baseline retrieval and generation metrics.

features.title: RAG Eval Dashboard
features.description: Display eval artifacts and stage comparisons for retrieval quality, faithfulness, latency, and cost.

features.title: Report archive and handoff artifacts
features.description: Persist final reports, agent events, retrieval records, citation validation, and eval artifacts for review.
